law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL HOMICIDE, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTING OF BODILY INJURY.

  Art. 398. Whoever intentionally inflicts wounds or blows shall be punished with imprisonment from eight days to six months and a fine of twenty-six [euro] to one hundred [euro] or with one of those penalties only.
  In case the offender acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment from one month to one year and a fine of fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].

  Art. 399. If the blows or wounds result in disease or inability to perform personal labor, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from two months to two years and a fine of fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].
  The offender shall be punished with imprisonment from six months to three years and a fine of one hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro], if he acted with premeditation.

  Art. 400. The penalty is imprisonment from two years to five years and a fine of two hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro], if the blows or wounds cause an incurable seeming disease, inability to perform personal labor for more than four months, complete loss of use of an organ, or a severe mutilation.
  The penalty is imprisonment from five years to ten years, if the offender acted with premeditation.

  Art. 401. When the blows or wounds are intentionally inflicted, but without the intent to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished with imprisonment from five years to ten years.
  He shall be punished with imprisonment from ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person

  IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows: Person -> Bool
  CausesDeath: Person -> Bool
  IntentWithoutKill: Person -> Bool
  CausesIncurableSeemingDisease: Person -> Bool
  CausesInabilityPerformPersonalLaborMoreThanFourMonths: Person -> Bool
  CausesCompleteLossOfOrganUse: Person -> Bool
  CausesSevereMutilation: Person -> Bool
  CausesDiseaseOrInabilityPerformPersonalLabor: Person -> Bool
  Premeditation: Person -> Bool

  liableArt401: Person -> Bool
  liableArt400: Person -> Bool
  liableArt399: Person -> Bool
  liableArt398: Person -> Bool

  imprisonmentMinDays: Person -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Person -> Int
  fineMinEuros: Person -> Int
  fineMaxEuros: Person -> Int
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person:
    liableArt401(p) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) &
      IntentWithoutKill(p) &
      CausesDeath(p).

  ! p in Person:
    liableArt400(p) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) &
      (
        CausesIncurableSeemingDisease(p) |
        CausesInabilityPerformPersonalLaborMoreThanFourMonths(p) |
        CausesCompleteLossOfOrganUse(p) |
        CausesSevereMutilation(p)
      ) &
      ~CausesDeath(p).

  ! p in Person:
    liableArt399(p) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) &
      CausesDiseaseOrInabilityPerformPersonalLabor(p) &
      ~CausesIncurableSeemingDisease(p) &
      ~CausesInabilityPerformPersonalLaborMoreThanFourMonths(p) &
      ~CausesCompleteLossOfOrganUse(p) &
      ~CausesSevereMutilation(p) &
      ~CausesDeath(p).

  ! p in Person:
    liableArt398(p) <=>
      IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(p) &
      ~CausesDiseaseOrInabilityPerformPersonalLabor(p) &
      ~CausesIncurableSeemingDisease(p) &
      ~CausesInabilityPerformPersonalLaborMoreThanFourMonths(p) &
      ~CausesCompleteLossOfOrganUse(p) &
      ~CausesSevereMutilation(p) &
      ~CausesDeath(p).

  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 3650.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 5475.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt401(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 1825.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 3650.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 730.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1825.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 200.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt400(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 500.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 180.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 1095.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & Premeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 100.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & Premeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 500.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 60.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 730.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 50.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt399(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 200.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 30.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 365.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & Premeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 50.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & Premeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 200.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMinDays(p) = 8.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => imprisonmentMaxDays(p) = 180.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => fineMinEuros(p) = 26.
  ! p in Person:
    (liableArt398(p) & ~Premeditation(p)) => fineMaxEuros(p) = 100.
}

case.text: Jan and Marie work in the same office. After an argument, Jan waits for Marie in the parking lot and deliberately hits her with a stick. Marie breaks her arm and has to stay home for four weeks; she cannot perform her work. Jan acted with premeditation: he had brought the stick and waited for her. The injuries did not cause incurable illness or loss of organs.

pipeline.natural_language: No. Jan is not liable under Article 398. (If you expected Yes, ensure case facts use the exact predicate names from the KB schema.)
Yes. Jan is liable under Article 399.

questions.text: What is the minimum prison sentence for Jan?

pipeline.natural_language: The minimum prison sentence for Jan is 180 days.
